<function=python>
<parameter=code>

print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed', False)}")
print(f"No impact: {last_action_result.get('no_impact', False)}")

if last_transition:
    before_lines = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    after_lines = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    diffs = []
    for i in range(2, len(before_lines)):
        for j in range(len(before_lines[i])):
            if before_lines[i][j] != after_lines[i][j]:
                diffs.append((i, j, before_lines[i][j], after_lines[i][j]))
    print(f"Gameplay diffs: {len(diffs)}")
    for d in diffs[:30]:
        print(f"  ({d[0]}, {d[1]}): {d[2]} -> {d[3]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

        print(f"  ({d[0]}, {d[1]}): {d[2]} -> {d[3]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
